ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Ill.mo Et Ex.mo Dno. Petro Fernandez à Castro Lemensium Et Andradae Comiti, Marchioni Sarriae, Comiti Villaluae, Commendatori Zarzae ordinis Alcantarae, Regi à cubiculo, Proregi Neapolitano, et supremi Italiae Consilij Praesidi. Scriptus.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: This text contains various references to Oziosi Academicians.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: M. Thaddeus Caputus Augustinianus Dep. vidit. Imprimatur Alexander Boschius Vic. Gener.

Dedicatees.ItacPersonItem: da Cerda e Sandoval,Catalina,Vicereine of Naples,

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
